name: raffle-backend
description: Backend API for Web3 Raffle Platform

scripts.settlement: node -e "const RaffleSettlementService = require('./src/services/raffleSettlement'); const service = new RaffleSettlementService(); service.checkAndSettleRaffles().then(() => console.log('✅ Settlement check complete')).catch(console.error);"

author: Web3 Raffle Platform Team
